accepted_findings.reason: Single-tenant operator image: root simplifies bind mounts and entrypoint (Alembic, uvicorn). Non-root USER can be added later when volume UIDs are aligned.
Same as missing-user-entrypoint: intentional root in this image; restrict exposure at the network / orchestration layer.
Default AGENT_CORS_ORIGINS=* is for local/dev; production sets explicit origins via env. Documented in .env.example and lifespan warning.

Dynamic SQL builds fixed clause shapes (OR/SET fragments); user-derived values use %s placeholders. Memory-graph keyword branch repeats (label ILIKE %s OR summary ILIKE %s) per token—tokens never interpolated as SQL keywords.

accepted_findings.message_regex: Avoiding SQL string concatenation|raw query|SQL string|concatenat
accepted_findings.reason: Alembic migration downgrade: `op.execute(f"ALTER TABLE … DROP COLUMN … {col}")` where `col` is iterated from a fixed tuple in this file only—no runtime user input.
Alembic migration: column names come from a fixed tuple in the migration file, not from HTTP input.
Workflow modules build LLM prompts for the product; user-derived content is inherent to an agent server and bounded by auth and tool policies.
Operator-only CLI scripts: URL is AGENT_BASE_URL plus fixed API path (http/https). Same as Bandit B310; line-level nosec in source.
Paths are workspace dataPath strings; __proto__/constructor/prototype segments are now rejected. Residual scanner noise may remain on older branches.
Pytest and unit tests use asserts; excluded from production Bandit scope via pyproject.toml exclude_dirs as well.
Internal invariants or operator-only tool paths; not a production security boundary under python -O.
Optional shutdown (incl. lifespan / bridge stop), best-effort parsing, or non-fatal cleanup; failures are logged where relevant or impact is benign.
Scheduled job discovery skips broken modules intentionally.
Message iteration skips malformed parts; bounded IMAP parsing.
OAuth token_type string 'bearer' in JSON responses, not a password.
Heuristic false positive on JSON null / display text 'None', not a credential.
User-facing curl examples and placeholder JSON for OTP registration (DEINE_MAIL, private-XXXX, etc.), not real secrets.
User secret service_key name for stored PAT, not an embedded credential.
Service key / tool domain identifier, not a password string.
random.randint used for ComfyUI KSampler seed variation, not cryptography.
f-string only joins fixed SQL fragments; values use %s placeholders. Memory graph keyword OR clause repeats parameterized ILIKE patterns per token.
Operator CLI: urllib opens HTTP(S) URLs built from AGENT_BASE_URL + fixed API paths; not arbitrary file:// from user input. nosec on urlopen line.
Paths resolved under configured tool roots (AGENT_TOOLS_EXTRA_DIR / image tools); authenticated admin/tool-governed surface, not arbitrary anonymous FS write.
Admin-only POST /v1/admin/rag/ingest-docs; docs_root is admin-controlled; resolved with Path.expanduser().resolve() for server-side ingest.

AGENT_LOG_LLM_ROUNDS logs model id and redacted assistant preview via _redact_secrets_for_log; HTTP error bodies are truncated provider JSON. CodeQL often flags 'password' substring in error text or heuristic on variable names.
POST URL is supplied by server config (Ollama base URL, operator external LLM endpoints), not arbitrary per-request user URLs in the default deployment model.
Allowlist-style host checks for ICS fetch policy; documented residual heuristic limitation.
External LLM base URL normalization uses allowlisted host substrings; known trade-off for Google OpenAI-compatible endpoints.
Tool run endpoints return HTTPException(detail=str(e)) without traceback; logger.exception is server-side only. Hardening: generic 500 in production.
Admin RAG routes map exceptions to HTTPException with safe message strings; no traceback in client response for declared paths.
Admin endpoints return generic details; logger.exception does not send Python tracebacks to clients.
JSON preset field run_key / comfy_txt2img_default matches generic secret heuristic; not an API key.
Same studio preset JSON / run_key false positive as studio_catalog.py.
